headline: Citigroup Downgrades Baxter International to Sell, Lowers Price Target to $17
summary: Citigroup  analyst Joanne Wuensch   downgrades Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) from Neutral to Sell and lowers the price target from $19 to $17.

raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Joanne Wuensch   downgrades Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) from Neutral to Sell and lowers the price target from $19 to $17.

headline: Josh Brown's 'best stocks in the market': Edwards Lifesciences
summary: Josh Brown, CEO of Ritholtz Wealth Management, joins CNBC's "Halftime Report" to detail Ritholt's new "Porterhouse" strategy. Josh also spotlights Edwards Lifesciences in his "Best Stocks in the Market."

headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Thursday's pre-market session.
summary: Before the opening bell on Thursday, let's take a glimpse of the US markets and explore the S&P500 top gainers and losers in today's pre-market session.
